nodes.name: Ploceus
nodes.summary: Ploceus（Ploceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联64种鸟类，如Yellow-legged weaver、Black-chinned weaver、Bannerman's weaver等64种鸟类。

nodes.name: Vitelline masked weaver
nodes.summary: The vitelline masked weaver (Ploceus vitellinus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in western, central, and eastern Africa. Gallery References External links Vitelline masked weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch.

nodes.name: Vitelline masked weaver
